design_philosophy.fusion: Architectural brutalism meets high-end editorial design. Replacing typical SaaS aesthetics with blueprint precision, raw material textures, and massive typography.
design_philosophy.emotion: Authoritative, precise, rugged but highly sophisticated.
design_philosophy.vibe: Editorial structure, newspaper-like layout, minimal text blocks, high contrast.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter).
Overlines/Labels must use monospace font (IBM Plex Mono), uppercase, wide spacing.
Never center align by default. Use explicit left alignment for an editorial feel.
The jump between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Use IBM Plex Mono for all numbers, dimensions, and PHP currency values.
Color is function only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome.
Use #002FA7 (International Klein Blue) for primary actionable items and blueprint references.
Use #FF5722 (Safety Orange) for accents, emphasis, or critical CTAs.
Do not use full-screen gradients. Prioritize structural grayscale and sharp contrasts.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID for Marketing Pages
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 for main layouts. Use col-span-full md:col-span-8 for hero elements.
Asymmetry creates tension. Do not perfectly center everything.
For mobile, always start with grid-cols-1 and ensure max-h-[80vh] for images.
Use the 'Grid Borders' concept: expose the skeleton by adding border-r and border-b to grid items.

header.style: Solid Background (#FFFFFF) with a hard 1px bottom border (#E5E5E5).
header.rules: Must have z-50. Do not use transparent headers over images. Links visible on desktop.

cards.style: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Square edges (rounded-none).
cards.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg), border color becomes #002FA7.
cards.pricing_pro: Use 'Tracing Beam' concept with a blueprint blue border to highlight the Pro tier.

forms.style: Shadcn UI Form, Input, Button heavily customized to match the stark, angular look.
forms.rules: No soft rounded corners (use rounded-none). High contrast focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]).

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-none uppercase font-mono tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-[#002FA7]/90 px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none uppercase font-mono tracking-widest text-sm hover:bg-[#F4F4F5] px-6 py-3

motion_and_interaction.hover: Explicitly set text color on hover. Focus states must have higher contrast.
motion_and_interaction.marquee: Use an Editorial Ribbon (Option A). Low contrast, monospace font, slow smooth drift.
rules: Animations should add weight and momentum. Keep micro-interactions minimal but precise.

icons.usage: Use sharp, linear variants. Size consistently (w-5 h-5). Used for functional UI, not decorative illustrations.

hero_bg.description: Construction workers standing under a cloud-filled sky.
hero_bg.usage: Main hero background image. Use with a strong white or light gray overlay (e.g., bg-white/60) to ensure deep black text contrast.

blueprint_texture.description: High-res close-up of a floor plan.
blueprint_texture.usage: Background layer for the 'Features' or 'How it works' section with a heavy screen/overlay.

engineer_1.description: Asian woman wearing a hard hat.

engineer_2.description: Asian man wearing a hard hat.

login_bg.description: Close-up view of a detailed architectural blueprint.
login_bg.usage: Half-screen background image for the Login and Signup pages.

landing_page: Navbar: Logo (ConsCalc), Links (Features, How it Works, Pricing, FAQ), Sign In CTA.
Hero: Massive typography ('STOP GUESSING. START BUILDING.'), subtext highlighting Philippine context, 'Get Started' CTA, Marquee ribbon below with module names.
Features (14 Modules): Bento grid layout. 5 categories: Earthworks, Structural Concrete, Masonry, Finishes, Site/Other. Highlight individual modules like Footing, Slab on Fill, Tiling, etc.
How it Works: 3-step editorial layout (1. Input Dimensions, 2. Get Bill of Materials, 3. View BOQ with PHP).
Pricing: 3 Tiers (Free, Pro, Team) priced in PHP. Pro tier highlighted with International Klein Blue.
Testimonials: Grid with portraits (using engineer_1 and engineer_2) and quotes from Filipino contractors/engineers.
FAQ: Accordion list using customized Shadcn. Stark technical style.
Footer: Dark/Black background (#0A0A0A) with massive 'LET'S BUILD' text and standard links. Light text for contrast.
auth_pages: Layout: Split screen grid (1 column mobile, 2 columns desktop). Left side image (login_bg), right side auth form.
Form: Clean, minimal Shadcn inputs. Email, Password, 'Sign in with Google' placeholder button, link to swap between login/signup.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA standards. Normal text min 4.5:1. Never use gray-on-gray.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='pricing-card-pro').

implementation_instructions.dependencies: Add fonts via Google Fonts in index.css (Outfit, Manrope, IBM Plex Mono). Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing layouts; heavily customize Shadcn for interactive forms.
implementation_instructions.component_usage: Use Shadcn Accordion for FAQ. Use Shadcn Card/Input/Button for Auth. Do NOT use generic SaaS UI. Stick to the grid-borders, sharp edges, and high-contrast philosophy.
